rawContent:
Tweet by @AlphaSignalAI (AlphaSignal AI)
Author bio: The latest news from the top 100 companies in AI. Over 300,000 devs read our newsletter.
Text: MIT just killed the idea that cheaper tokens mean cheaper AI.

A paper from MIT, Stanford, Google DeepMind, and Microsoft found agents use 1000x more tokens than chat.

The cost isn't the code they write. It's re-reading context on every loop.

Same task, same model: 30x cost variance.
